name: rkt
description: Personal Claude Code plugin for project bootstrapping and workflow orchestration

default_linear_team_id.title: Default Linear team ID
default_linear_team_id.description: Default Linear team ID for new projects (e.g. 'RKT'). Find via: linear api <<< 'query { teams { nodes { id key name } } }'

default_github_owner.title: Default GitHub owner
default_github_owner.description: GitHub username or org for gh repo create

default_ios_device.title: Default iOS device
default_ios_device.description: Default iOS device/simulator name for builds (e.g. 'rocket' or 'iPhone 17 Pro')

default_gh_visibility.title: Default GitHub repo visibility
default_gh_visibility.description: Default visibility for new GitHub repos: 'private' or 'public'
